name: Wise Words of Wisdom

abilities.name: Warming Glow
abilities.text: When this model is dealt damage from a (M), it may drain a (soulstone) to heal that amount instead.

abilities.name: Zoom and Boom
abilities.text: This model's Charge action may generate non-general tactical actions instead of (melee) actions. Any movement this model makes as a result of the generated action is ignored.

actions.name: The Ol' Switcheroo
actions.effects: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target. Then deal 1 damage to models within (M)2" of the target. Remove the target.

triggers.name: Porksplosions
triggers.text: Summon a Flying Piglet within range.

extraction_notes: Signature action indicated by dagger symbol (†) before action name
Pyrotechnic marker referenced but not defined on this card - likely defined elsewhere
